mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N' AND inspected_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE) AS total_inspections, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N' AND result = 'PASS' AND inspected_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE) AS pass_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N' AND result = 'FAIL' AND inspected_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE) AS fail_count, ROUND( ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N' AND result = 'PASS' AND inspected_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE)::NUMERIC / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N' AND inspected_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE), 0) ) * 100, 2 ) AS pass_rate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N' AND grade = 'A' AND inspected_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE) AS grade_a_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N' AND grade = 'B' AND inspected_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE) AS grade_b_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N' AND grade = 'C' AND inspected_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE) AS grade_c_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM defects WHERE created_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE) AS total_defects, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM defects WHERE severity = 'CRITICAL' AND created_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE) AS critical_defect_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM defects WHERE severity = 'MAJOR' AND created_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE) AS major_defect_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM defects WHERE severity = 'MINOR' AND created_at::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE) AS minor_defect_count

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_work_orders, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PLANNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS planned_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'RUNNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS running_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS done_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'HOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS hold_count, COALESCE(SUM(target_qty), 0) AS total_target_qty, COALESCE(SUM(actual_qty), 0) AS total_actual_qty, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(actual_qty), 0)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(target_qty), 0), 0) * 100, 2) AS achievement_rate FROM work_orders WHERE planned_start::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE

SELECT p.process_type, COALESCE(w.order_count, 0) AS order_count, COALESCE(w.done_count, 0) AS done_count, COALESCE(w.target_qty, 0) AS target_qty, COALESCE(w.actual_qty, 0) AS actual_qty, ROUND(COALESCE(w.actual_qty, 0)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COALESCE(w.target_qty, 0), 0) * 100, 2) AS achievement_rate FROM ( SELECT '전극' AS process_type UNION ALL SELECT '조립' UNION ALL SELECT '화성' UNION ALL SELECT '검사' ) p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT process_type, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS done_count, SUM(target_qty) AS target_qty, SUM(actual_qty) AS actual_qty FROM work_orders WHERE planned_start::DATE BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE GROUP BY process_type ) w ON w.process_type = p.process_type ORDER BY CASE p.process_type WHEN '전극' THEN 1 WHEN '조립' THEN 2 WHEN '화성' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
